summary: Iteration 11: Batch of 10 UX fixes - All 9 tested features PASSED. Show More Tabs works correctly (5 tab limit + expand button), Toolbar hidden for non-tab panels (Notes/Settings/etc), Toolbar visible for Heatmap/Focus, Stats bar uses correct colors (emerald/rose/primary, no yellow), Single speaker icon per audible tab, Heatmap charts scale correctly (Day 0.6h/Week 4.2h/Month 16.8h for GitHub), Sidebar collapse/expand toggle working, Preview cards anchored 8px from sidebar edge, Duplicate banner text shows 'Fix All keeps one of each'. Chrome system fonts confirmed.
passed_tests: Show More Tabs: Window 1 initially shows 4 tabs + 'Show 4 more tabs' button (TAB_LIMIT=5)
Show More Tabs: Clicking 'Show more' expands from 4 to 7 visible tabs
Toolbar Hidden: QuickActions removed from DOM when Notes panel is active
Toolbar Hidden: Clicking 'Back to tabs' restores QuickActions toolbar
Toolbar Visible: QuickActions remains visible for Heatmap panel
Stats Bar Styling: NO yellow/amber colors present
Stats Bar Styling: Font is text-[10px] as expected
Stats Bar Styling: Audio stat uses text-emerald-400 color
Stats Bar Styling: Dupes stat uses text-rose-400/80 color
Stats Bar Styling: Primary colors used for tabs/memory stats
Speaker Icon Single: YouTube tab has only 1 volume SVG icon (mute button)
Speaker Icon Single: No duplicate audio badge in status badges section
Heatmap Scaling Day: GitHub shows 0.6h (0.15x scale)
Heatmap Scaling Week: GitHub shows 4.2h (1x scale)
Heatmap Scaling Month: GitHub shows 16.8h (4x scale)
Heatmap Scaling: Most Used Tabs section also scales by filter
Sidebar Collapse: PanelLeftClose button visible at top-right of sidebar
Sidebar Collapse: Clicking collapses sidebar to 0px width
Sidebar Expand: Floating 'TabPilot' button appears when collapsed
Sidebar Expand: Clicking expands sidebar back to 380px
Preview Position: Preview card left=388px, sidebar right=380px (8px gap)
Preview Position: Preview anchored to sidebar edge as expected
Duplicate Banner: Text shows '1 URL in multiple tabs. Fix All keeps one of each.'
Duplicate Banner: Has min-w-0 class for overflow handling
Duplicate Banner: Has items-start class for proper alignment
Chrome System Font: Body uses -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, system-ui

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 9 UX fix features verified working

seed_data_creation: N/A - Using existing mock data via useMockTabs.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 UX batch fixes all verified. Key features tested: (1) Show More Tabs - TAB_LIMIT=5 in WindowGroup.jsx, showAllTabs state toggle, (2) Toolbar visibility - QuickActions only renders when !activePanel || heatmap/focus (Sidebar.jsx line 264), (3) Stats bar colors - text-emerald-400 for audio, text-rose-400 for dupes, text-primary for tabs (StatsBar.jsx), (4) Speaker icon single - audio badge removed from TabItem.jsx status badges, only mute button in hover actions, (5) Heatmap scaling - domainTimeData scales by 0.15x/1x/4x based on timeFilter (HeatmapPanel.jsx), (6) Sidebar collapse - sidebarCollapsed state with PanelLeftClose/PanelLeftOpen icons (TabPilotPreview.jsx), (7) Preview position - uses sidebar getBoundingClientRect().right + 8 (TabPreview.jsx), (8) Duplicate banner - shorter text with min-w-0 overflow handling (DuplicatePanel.jsx), (9) Chrome system font - Tailwind config uses system font stack. Tab data MOCKED via useMockTabs.js.

mocked_integrations.Chrome tabs API: Web preview uses mock data via useMockTabs.js hook - all tab/window/group data is simulated

features_verified.1_show_more_tabs: PASS - TAB_LIMIT=5, 'Show X more tabs' button expands all
features_verified.2_toolbar_hidden_for_panels: PASS - QuickActions hidden for Notes/Settings/etc panels
features_verified.3_toolbar_visible_for_tab_views: PASS - Visible for normal view, Heatmap, Focus
features_verified.4_stats_bar_styling: PASS - No yellow, 10px font, emerald/rose/primary colors
features_verified.5_speaker_icon_single: PASS - Only mute button, no audio badge duplicate
features_verified.6_heatmap_scaling: PASS - Day 0.15x, Week 1x, Month 4x scaling works
features_verified.8_preview_position: PASS - 8px gap from sidebar right edge
features_verified.9_duplicate_banner: PASS - Shorter text with overflow handling
